title: Daoist Canon: Yinfu Jing (Scripture of Hidden Tally) (Section 4)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Yinfu Jing (Scripture of Hidden Tally)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Yinfu Jing (Scripture of Hidden Tally)

translation.text: From the Yinfu Jing (Scripture of Hidden Tally) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
